It's bright, lightweight, and easy to use - just push the button to activate the multi-color LED lights. And for those looking for a more classic look, our glow stick is a tried-and-true option that always gets the party started. This bendable foam glow is easy to handle and perfect for dancing the night away. Over 5000 pcs is by SEA

products.summary: The Mop Head Pen is a sleek and functional writing tool that doubles as a screen cleaner and stylus.
products.name: Mop Head Screen Cleaner Stylus Pens
products.description: The Mop Head Pen is made from high-quality ABS material, it writes smoothly without skipping or blotching. The comfortable grip and precision tip are perfect for writing and touchscreen use. Plus, the fuzzy head easily removes dust and fingerprints from screens. Ideal for school, office, or gift giving, the Pop Pen is a practical and stylish addition to any writing arsenal. Grab yours today and make a statement with every stroke! 10000pcs shipping by sea.
